summary: Tested Cloudinary integration for image uploads with Emergent Storage fallback. All 20 backend tests passed. Fixed 3 bugs: (1) GET /api/businesses/me/photos missing 'url' field for legacy photos, (2) DELETE photo failing with KeyError for legacy photos, (3) /api/files/{path} not serving logo images. Frontend verified: logo upload required in Step 1, logo displayed in dashboard and profile.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/businesses/me/photos - upload gallery photo returns url, public_id, id, original_filename
Backend: POST /api/businesses/me/photos with .jfif file - accepts application/octet-stream content type
Backend: POST /api/businesses/me/logo - upload logo returns secure_url, public_id
Backend: GET /api/businesses/me/photos - returns list of photos with url field
Backend: POST /api/upload/image - generic upload returns 401 without auth, 503 when Cloudinary not configured
Backend: File validation - rejects non-image files with 400, rejects files >5MB
Backend: GET /api/businesses/me/dashboard - includes logo_url and photos array
Frontend: /business/register Step 1 - shows 'Logo del negocio *' with data-testid='logo-upload-area'
Frontend: /business/register Step 1 - validation rejects if logo not uploaded (toast: 'El logo de tu negocio es obligatorio')
Frontend: Business profile page - shows logo with data-testid='business-logo'
Frontend: Business dashboard - shows logo in header avatar (after fix to /api/files endpoint)
Frontend: Business dashboard Photos tab - shows photo gallery with upload button

bugs_fixed.issue: GET /api/businesses/me/photos missing 'url' field for legacy photos with storage_path
bugs_fixed.fix: Added normalization to construct url from storage_path for legacy photos

bugs_fixed.issue: DELETE /api/businesses/me/photos/{id} failing with KeyError: 'url' for legacy photos
bugs_fixed.fix: Used photo.get('url') or photo.get('storage_path') with URL construction fallback

bugs_fixed.issue: /api/files/{path} only checked business_photos collection, not logos stored in businesses collection
bugs_fixed.fix: Added fallback lookup in businesses collection for logo_public_id

bugs_fixed.issue: POST /api/upload/image using get_current_user (optional auth) instead of require_auth
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed dependency to require_auth so it returns 401 for unauthenticated requests

mocked_api_note.Cloudinary: NOT configured in preview env - uses Emergent Object Storage fallback (expected)

seed_data_creation: Uploaded test logo image (100x100 blue square) via API for dashboard logo testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 tested Cloudinary integration with Emergent Storage fallback. Key findings: (1) In preview env without Cloudinary credentials, all uploads use Emergent Object Storage and URLs are /api/files/... (2) POST /api/upload/image returns 503 when Cloudinary not configured (expected), (3) Logo upload is mandatory in Step 1 registration, (4) Fixed 4 bugs related to legacy photo handling and file serving. All data-testids verified: logo-upload-area, logo-file-input, business-logo. Test business logo is now a 100x100 blue square image.
